description: EU GPSR product-safety compliance automation for Shopify (bulk classification rules engine + storefront safety block).

features.name: Project scaffold + init.sh green
features.description: Monorepo skeleton (frontend/, backend/, storefront/ extensions, root shopify.app.toml), docker-compose MySQL:3308, init.sh runs the full verify chain to green.
features.evidence: FULL init.sh GREEN (exit 0): 'HARNESS XANH — verify chain passed.' Toolchain go1.24.10 + node v22.20.0 + docker ok. DB: MySQL 8.4 on host port 3308 healthy (fixed: removed --default-authentication-plugin which MySQL 8.4 dropped). Backend: go vet ok, go build ok, go test ok (TestHealthz PASS, GET /healthz -> 200 {"status":"ok"}). Admin: npm run lint exit 0; vitest run -> 1/1 passed (src/App.test.tsx); vite build -> dist emitted in ~683ms. Files: backend/ (go.mod, cmd/server, internal/{handler,config,service,repository,model}, migrations/), admin/ (Vite5+React18+TS5, vitest), docker-compose.yml (mysql:8.4 -> 3308). Contract: _workspace/F0_backend_api_contract.md.

features.name: Data model + migrations
features.description: MySQL schema for entity, warning_template, classification_rule, compliance_record. Migrations with up/down.
features.evidence: FULL init.sh GREEN (exit 0): 'HARNESS XANH — verify chain passed.' Migration approach: dependency-light Go runner (internal/migrate) over plain SQL files migrations/001_initial_schema.{up,down}.sql; CLI cmd/migrate (up|down). Host has Go but no migrate/mysql client, so a Go runner keeps init.sh on Go commands. init.sh runs `go run ./cmd/migrate up` after MySQL healthy, before go test. TDD: wrote internal/migrate/migrate_test.go (Load ordering, missing-down error, statement split, regression: semicolon-in-comment) RED first, then runner GREEN; DB-backed internal/migrate/migrate_db_test.go TestUpDownRoundTrip PASS (applies, asserts 7 tables, idempotent re-up no-op, down+up cycle). `go test ./... ` ok; go vet ok; go build ok. Real DB on 3308: UP -> applied versions [1]; SHOW TABLES = classification_rule, compliance_record, compliance_record_warnings, entity, product, rule_warning_templates, schema_migrations, warning_template; DESCRIBE compliance_record proves status ENUM('ok','needs_review','override') default needs_review and matched_rule_id Null=YES; UP again -> 'nothing to apply' (idempotent); DOWN -> rolled back version 1, SHOW TABLES = only schema_migrations; UP -> applied [1] again. C5 verified: DELETE referenced entity -> MySQL Error 1451 (fk_rule_entity RESTRICT); DELETE referenced warning_template -> Error 1451 (fk_rwt_template RESTRICT). Join tables (rule_warning_templates, compliance_record_warnings) chosen over JSON id arrays so FK RESTRICT can enforce C5; match_conditions/applies_to/tags are JSON. Published schema: _workspace/F1_backend_schema.md.

features.name: GPSR rules engine (core logic)
features.description: Classify product -> responsible entity + warnings; deterministic, auditable (records matched rule id); terminal states ok/needs_review/override.
features.evidence: FULL init.sh GREEN (exit 0): 'HARNESS XANH — verify chain passed.' TDD (RED-first, verified): wrote engine_test.go then engine.go; classifier_test.go then classifier.go; repository compliance_db_test.go then compliance.go. go vet ./... exit 0; go build ./... exit 0; go test ./... all PASS (no SKIP, DB up). Pure engine (internal/service/engine.go, NO DB): Classify orders rules by (priority asc, id asc) first-match-wins (C1), ALL present conditions must hold, absent product field never matches incl. empty-string (C4), empty-condition rule matches nothing; match->ok+matched_rule_id+entity+warnings, no-match->needs_review inventing nothing (C2); Classify never emits override. Classifier (classifier.go) over a ComplianceRepository interface (unit-tested with in-memory fake): ApplyRuleset bulk skips existing override records (C3 fwd) else reclassifies+upserts -> idempotent (C6); SetOverride writes override w/ matched_rule_id NULL; ClearOverride deletes record so inference resumes (C3 rev). Repository (repository/compliance.go) parameterized SQL only; SaveRecord = single-tx upsert by product_id UNIQUE + replace compliance_record_warnings join (dedup); GetProducts decodes JSON tags, NULL scalars->nil (C4). Tests PASS: TestClassify_SingleCondition (16 subtests tag/category/material/origin match+no-match+C4), TestClassify_NoMatch_NeedsReview, TestClassify_Match_RecordsAudit, TestClassify_Precedence_FirstMatchWins (lower priority + tie->lower id), TestClassify_Determinism (shuffled-input + repeat identical), TestClassify_Invariant_TerminalState (C2 property: every product exactly one valid terminal state), TestApplyRuleset_BasicInference, TestApplyRuleset_OverrideSurvivesRerun (C3), TestSetAndClearOverride (C3 both directions), TestApplyRuleset_Idempotent (C6); DB-backed (real MySQL:3308): TestRepo_GetProducts_ParsesJSON, TestRepo_SaveAndGetRecord (upsert no-dup + audit), TestRepo_DeleteRecord, TestRepo_GetRecord_Absent. Security: injection guard test seeds warning text `Choking hazard'); DROP TABLE entity;--` and asserts entity table survives a round-trip (parameterized queries, no interpolation) — ready for security-reviewer. Fixed cross-package test-isolation race (migrate round-trip DOWN dropped tables while repository suite read them under parallel `go test ./...`): added a shared MySQL GET_LOCK('gpsr_schema_test_lock') held per DB test in both internal/migrate/migrate_db_test.go and internal/repository/compliance_db_test.go — full suite now deterministically GREEN 8/8 with clean test cache and no `-p 1` flag (root-cause fix, init.sh untouched). Published engine API + record shape: _workspace/F2_backend_engine.md. Files: backend/internal/model/gpsr.go, internal/service/{engine,classifier}.go (+_test), internal/repository/{compliance,compliance_contract_test,compliance_db_test}.go. [FOLLOW-UP FIX 2026-06-28 — false-green DB tier (F2 independent QA F-1 / security Item 5, MEDIUM, both flagged same issue): ROOT CAUSE — repository + migrate DB tests called t.Skipf on any connection/auth failure, so a bare `cd backend && go test ./...` (config.Load() defaults DB_PASSWORD='' when .env isn't exported) connect-failed -> SKIPPED the entire DB tier incl. the SQL-injection guard (TestRepo_SaveAndGetRecord) yet still printed `ok`/exit 0 — false-green. REPRODUCED: `go clean -testcache && DB_PORT=19999 go test -v ./internal/repository/` -> all 4 DB tests --- SKIP but `ok ... 0.004s` exit 0. MECHANISM CHOSEN — explicit opt-in env var GPSR_DB_TESTS=1 (over a build tag, because it needs no recompile, is trivial for CI/init.sh to set inline, and keeps one binary). New shared helper internal/dbtest/dbtest.go (SkipOrFail): when GPSR_DB_TESTS set, an unreachable/misconfigured DB calls t.Fatalf (DB tier guaranteed to run); when unset, t.Skipf (offline local-dev stays portable). Applied consistently to BOTH internal/repository/compliance_db_test.go and internal/migrate/migrate_db_test.go (the two skip sites in each openTestDB). init.sh now runs the DB test step as `GPSR_DB_TESTS=1 go test ./...` when docker-compose (and thus MySQL:3308) is up, and plain `go test ./...` only on the no-DB offline path. GET_LOCK('gpsr_schema_test_lock') isolation fix kept intact; no assertion weakened. VERIFIED (verbatim): (1) guard OFF + DB_PORT=19999 -> 5 DB tests SKIP, both pkgs `ok`, exit 0 (acceptable offline). (2) GPSR_DB_TESTS=1 + .env loaded -> TestRepo_SaveAndGetRecord PASS 0.03s + TestUpDownRoundTrip PASS 0.29s (RUN, no SKIP — injection guard executed). (3) GPSR_DB_TESTS=1 + DB_PASSWORD=wrong_password -> both --- FAIL with 'DB-backed tests required (GPSR_DB_TESTS=1) but database unusable: ... Error 1045 (28000): Access denied', exit code 1 — false-green closed. (4) `bash init.sh` -> HARNESS XANH (exit 0) with `[ok] go test (DB tier required: GPSR_DB_TESTS=1)` and real DB-tier exec `ok ... internal/migrate 0.297s`, `ok ... internal/repository 0.359s` (vs ~0.003s skip times). New files: backend/internal/dbtest/dbtest.go. Modified: backend/internal/repository/compliance_db_test.go, backend/internal/migrate/migrate_db_test.go, init.sh.]

features.name: Shopify per-shop auth + install (OAuth)
features.description: Multi-tenant install flow: migration for `shop` table (shop_domain, access_token, scope, installed_at). GET /auth?shop=... -> Shopify OAuth -> /auth/callback stores per-shop token. App Bridge session-token (JWT) middleware verifies every admin API request and resolves the calling shop. Backend listens on port 8000 (matches nginx). Minimal redirect URLs documented for shopify.app.toml (built in F9).
features.evidence: FULL init.sh GREEN (exit 0): 'HARNESS XANH — verify chain passed.' with DB tier (MySQL:3308 healthy, migration 002 shop table applied, GPSR_DB_TESTS=1). TDD (RED-first, verified): wrote handler/service tests before code; security fixes also TDD (saw empty-secret tests FAIL with 'accepted a token forged with an EMPTY secret; auth is forgeable', then PASS after fix). Files: backend/migrations/002_shop.{up,down}.sql (shop: id, shop_domain UNIQUE, access_token, scope, installed_at), internal/model/shop.go (access_token json:"-"), internal/repository/shop.go (parameterized Upsert/GetByDomain), internal/service/shopify_auth.go (HMAC verify, signed state, JWT verify), internal/service/token_exchange.go, internal/handler/{auth,session}.go, cmd/server/main.go (wires OAuth + session-token mw, port 8000). FLOW: GET /auth?shop=... validates shop domain (strict regex, no open redirect) -> redirect to Shopify consent with crypto/rand 256-bit signed-state HttpOnly/Secure/Lax cookie; GET /auth/callback verifies HMAC (constant-time hmac.Equal) + state (constant-time) BEFORE code exchange -> exchanges code -> Upserts per-shop token; /api/* protected by RequireSessionToken mw that verifies App Bridge JWT (alg pinned HS256, sig before payload, aud=apiKey, exp/nbf) and loads the installed shop row (uninstalled -> 401). Tests PASS (go test ./internal/service/ ./internal/handler/ ./internal/config/ -v, all green, no skip): TestAuthBegin_RedirectsToShopify, TestAuthBegin_RejectsBadShop_NoOpenRedirect, TestAuthCallback_Success_StoresTokenAndRedirects, TestAuthCallback_TamperedHMAC_Rejected, TestAuthCallback_StateMismatch_Rejected, TestAuthCallback_MissingStateCookie_Rejected, TestAuthCallback_ExchangeFails_502, TestApiMe_ValidToken_ReturnsShop, TestApiMe_Rejects, TestApiMe_UninstalledShop_Rejected, TestValidateShopDomain (16 assertions incl userinfo @-trick, suffix-substring, path traversal, scheme prefix, embedded newline, null byte), TestVerifyQueryHMAC, TestStateNonce, TestVerifySessionToken (alg=none/bad-sig/wrong-aud/expired/nbf-future/non-myshopify-dest). DB-backed: shop repository round-trip via init.sh DB tier. SECURITY GATE — independent security-reviewer (separate from doer): first pass FAIL on F3-SEC-1 (HIGH) — auth fully forgeable when SHOPIFY_API_SECRET empty, no fail-closed boot check; reviewer REPRODUCED VerifySessionToken(forgedJWT,"",key)=accepted=true. FIX (TDD, backend-engineer): config.Validate() refuses empty/whitespace SHOPIFY_API_SECRET/API_KEY/APP_URL (strings.TrimSpace), called in cmd/server/main.go before serving with log.Fatalf (server-only; migrate NOT gated, runs on DB creds alone); defense-in-depth empty-secret guards in VerifySessionToken/VerifyQueryHMAC/VerifyState; gin.LoggerWithConfig formatter strips query string so OAuth code/hmac no longer logged (F3-SEC-2); BACKEND_PORT default drift 8080->8000 fixed. RE-VERIFY independent security-reviewer: VERDICT PASS — re-ran the original forgery, now REJECTED ('refusing to verify: empty app secret') at both primitive and boot; legit signature still accepted, wrong secret still rejected (no regression); full original security suite green. Reports: _workspace/F3_backend_auth.md (contract), _workspace/F3_security_auth.md (FAIL->detail). Follow-up non-blockers: F3-SEC-3 token-at-rest encryption (phase 2). Real OAuth callback from Shopify servers requires a publicly reachable SHOPIFY_APP_URL (gpsr.quotesnap.local is local-only) — a tunnel/deploy concern for F9, not a code defect.

features.name: Backend API (Gin) + Shopify sync
features.description: Per-shop product read sync (Admin API) + webhook on product create/update into local mirror (idempotent upsert, C7). Endpoints for products+status, rules CRUD, entity/template library, bulk apply-ruleset. All requests scoped to the authenticated shop. Published JSON shapes (snake_case).
features.evidence: FULL init.sh GREEN (exit 0): 'HARNESS XANH — verify chain passed.' with DB tier real (MySQL:3308, GPSR_DB_TESTS=1, migrate up applied [1 2 3]; uncached DB test times handler 3.7s/migrate 3.1s/repository 3.6s — not skip-times). 168 tests PASS, 0 SKIP, 0 FAIL. TDD RED-first throughout (build agent + both security fixes saw fail-then-pass). DESIGN approved first: docs/specs/F3b-api-contract.md. CRITICAL multi-tenant migration: migrations/003_shop_scoping.{up,down}.sql adds shop_id NOT NULL + FK ON DELETE CASCADE to entity/warning_template/product/classification_rule/compliance_record; product PK→surrogate id + shopify_product_id with UNIQUE(shop_id,shopify_product_id) (Q1 Option A); per-shop unique/precedence keys (compliance UNIQUE(shop_id,product_id); rule idx (shop_id,priority)); compliance_record.entity_id→NULLable + FK SET NULL (needed for C2 needs_review records). Migration up→down→up clean (TestUpDownRoundTrip + TestMigration003_DownRestores PASS). F2 contract change: ComplianceRepository (GetProducts/GetRecord/SaveRecord/DeleteRecord) + Classifier (ApplyRuleset/SetOverride/ClearOverride) gained leading shopID; pure Classify(product,rules) UNCHANGED. NEW files: repository/{product,entity,warning_template,rule,errors}.go; service/{shopify_admin,shopify_admin_http}.go + VerifyWebhookHMAC in shopify_auth.go; handler/{webhook,api,csp}.go; model ProductWithCompliance. Endpoints (all /api/* shop-scoped via RequireSessionToken+ShopFromContext): GET /api/products (offset pagination ?page=&limit= default 50 max 250, has_next — Q4); entity/warning-template/rule CRUD (201/204; DELETE referenced→409 mapping MySQL 1451; cross-shop id→404); rules list ordered (priority,id) C1; POST /api/compliance/apply (F2 ApplyRuleset); POST /api/compliance/override + DELETE /api/compliance/override/:product_id (C3); POST /api/sync (contract-based, live deferred). Webhooks (root, raw-body HMAC, no session): POST /webhooks/products/{create,update} — VerifyWebhookHMAC constant-time + empty-secret fail-closed, raw body read before JSON parse, unknown shop→401, idempotent upsert C7, mark needs_review unless override C3/C8. CSP middleware: frame-ancestors https://<validated-shop>.myshopify.com https://admin.shopify.com (invalid/absent shop→admin.shopify.com only; no reflect, no '*'). nginx: deploy/nginx adds /webhooks to location alternation, CSP not stripped. VERIFICATION (separate doer/checker): QA-integration PASS (_workspace/F3b_qa_report.md — 168 tests no skip, false-green guard proven via DB_PORT=9999 FAIL, no contract drift, shop-isolation holds incl own 2-shop same-shopify-id throwaway test, 3 deviations sound). Security-reviewer PASS no HIGH/CRITICAL (_workspace/F3b_security_review.md), found 2 MEDIUM both REPRODUCED: F3b-SEC-1 setOverride missing product-ownership (cross-shop phantom record) + F3b-SEC-2 SSRF (admin client egress to unvalidated host leaking token). Both FIXED via TDD (handler/api.go setOverride now GetWithCompliance→404 cross-shop; shopify_admin_http.go FetchProducts ValidateShopDomain before egress) and INDEPENDENTLY RE-VERIFIED PASS with mutation testing (reverting each fix reproduces the exact exploit → tests are load-bearing; cross-shop override→404 with 0 rows; hostile domains evil.com/169.254.169.254/localhost/userinfo-trick→zero egress; no regression). Deviations: offset pagination (Q4), entity_id NULLable+SET NULL (C2 not weakening C5), app-orchestrated shop teardown (C5 RESTRICT intact + cascade proven). Published shapes: _workspace/F3b_backend_api.md. Follow-ups (non-blocking): live Shopify sync/webhook delivery deferred to F9 (unit-tested w/ fakes); F9 uninstall handler must use proven delete order; frontend keys on SURROGATE id not Shopify id; 5 npm vulns (1 critical) in frontend tree to address at F4.

features.name: Admin: entity + warning-template library
features.description: React screens to manage responsible operators and warning templates (the data rules reference by id). Embedded via App Bridge; calls the shop-scoped API.
features.evidence: FULL init.sh GREEN (exit 0): 'HARNESS XANH — verify chain passed.' (verified from CLEAN: rm -rf node_modules/dist then npm ci resolved @shopify/polaris@13.9.5 + @shopify/app-bridge@3.7.11 + react-router-dom; 47 tests PASS across 5 files; vite build OK — 1410 modules, dist emitted). Built in PARALLEL with F5 (both deps F3b); F4 owns the shared app-shell + Polaris install. TDD RED-first (client.test.ts import-fail before client.ts, then green). Shopify POLARIS UI throughout (Built-for-Shopify quality, no raw HTML): AppProvider+Frame+Navigation shell wraps whole tree; IndexTable lists; Modal+FormLayout create/edit; Banner/InlineError errors. EMBEDDED: src/api/client.ts acquires App Bridge session token (isShopifyEmbedded→getSessionToken), attaches Authorization: Bearer <jwt> on every /api call (backend RequireSessionToken), writes token to sessionStorage for F5, degrades gracefully (not-embedded → 401 surfaced not crash). Screens: EntityLibraryScreen (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/entities; 409-referenced → Banner, row stays; surrogate id key) + WarningTemplateLibraryScreen (same; merchant text rendered as React text, NEVER dangerouslySetInnerHTML — XSS test passes). Files: src/api/{types,client,client.test}.ts; src/screens/{EntityLibraryScreen,WarningTemplateLibraryScreen}{,.test}.tsx; App.tsx shell. VERIFY: QA-integration CONDITIONAL PASS (_workspace/F4_F5_qa_report.md) — NO contract drift on entities (all fields exact snake_case, 201/200/204/409/404/401 handled), merge consistent (AppProvider wraps tree, all routes resolve real screens), 409 shows Banner not crash, surrogate id used. 1 LOW finding F4-1 (types.ts AppliesTo narrower than Go *MatchConditions) FIXED: widened to {tags?,category?,material?,origin?} matching Go json tags exactly (verified against gpsr.go:77-82), init.sh re-GREEN. Published shapes: _workspace/F4_frontend_data_shapes.md. Follow-ups (F8, non-blocking): 649KB JS chunk >500KB warning; dev-only npm vulns.

features.name: Admin: classification rules config
features.description: Ordered rules list with visible precedence + editing.
features.evidence: FULL init.sh GREEN (exit 0): 'HARNESS XANH — verify chain passed.' (same clean integration run as F4 — 47 tests PASS incl. F5's, Polaris build OK). Built in PARALLEL with F4; F5 rules-scoped, reused F4's shared client/types (no package.json edit — F4 owned Polaris install). TDD RED-first: src/screens/rulesSort.ts sortRulesForDisplay tested before impl (import-fail RED → 6 ordering tests GREEN). Shopify POLARIS UI: Page+Card+IndexTable for the ordered rules list with VISIBLE precedence (rank badges #1/#2 + separate priority column); Modal+FormLayout+TextField/Select/Checkbox for the rule form; Banner/InlineError for cross-shop 400/404 errors. CORE F5 story (merchant controls classification order): GET /api/rules returns (priority asc, id asc) order, rendered in that order, precedence obvious. Rule CRUD: POST 201 {priority, match_conditions:{tags?,category?,material?,origin?}, entity_id, warning_template_ids[]}; PUT/:id; DELETE 204. Reorder = EDITING priority (Q5 — NO bulk-reorder endpoint; grep-confirmed rules.ts never calls /api/rules/order). match_conditions form distinguishes ABSENT (unchecked → field omitted, C4 wildcard) vs present; checked-but-blank → InlineError before any API call. entity_id/warning_template_ids picked from shop's entities/templates; cross-shop refs → backend 400/404 surfaced. Files: src/api/rules.ts; src/screens/{RulesScreen,RuleFormModal,rulesSort}.tsx + RulesScreen.test.tsx; App.tsx /rules route (static import, real screen not stub). VERIFY: QA-integration CONDITIONAL PASS (_workspace/F4_F5_qa_report.md) — NO drift on rules (match_conditions fields + nullability exact, entity_id/warning_template_ids snake_case match), no phantom order endpoint, precedence (priority,id) holds, C4 absent-vs-present respected, merge consistent (RuleFormModal is F5's real 484-line impl). F4-1 LOW (shared types.ts) fixed under F4. Follow-ups (F8): bundle size warning, dev-only npm vulns.

features.name: Admin: bulk product editor + compliance status
features.description: Product table with status; bulk apply-ruleset / override / mark reviewed; per-item result.
features.evidence: DONE WITH CONDITION (E2E tier deferred to F9 — user decision 2026-06-29: Playwright E2E for compliance UI runs against the deployed env at F9, covering F6+F7 together; unit/integration tier closed now). FULL init.sh GREEN (exit 0): 'HARNESS XANH — verify chain passed.' Frontend chain lint+test+build all pass; 68 tests total (21 new F6 in ProductsScreen.test.tsx). TDD RED-first: ProductsScreen.test.tsx written before screen (import-fail RED → 21 GREEN). Shopify POLARIS, reuses F4 shell + App Bridge session token + F3b API. Files: src/api/products.ts (fetchProducts/applyRuleset/setOverride/clearOverride) + types.ts (Product/ComplianceRecord/ApplyResponse/OverrideBody etc, Go *int64→number|null); src/screens/{ProductsScreen,ProductsScreen.test}.tsx; App.tsx (Products nav + /products route, default redirect →/products). FEATURES: GET /api/products IndexTable with bulk selection (offset pagination page/limit, response {products,page,has_next}); compliance status as 3 VISUALLY DISTINCT terminal states — ok=Badge success(green), needs_review=Badge attention(orange), override=Badge info(blue), null=subdued 'No Record' text (test enforces needs_review badge != ok badge by tone+text+identity); bulk apply-ruleset POST /api/compliance/apply showing PER-ITEM result (re-fetch + row badge update, test asserts fetch called twice + badge count change, not opaque spinner); set-override POST + clear-override DELETE per selected; 'mark reviewed' = apply-ruleset (no backend flip endpoint exists — gap resolved WITHOUT phantom endpoint, documented). Surrogate id used for all calls/keys. VERIFY: QA-integration PASS unit/integration tier (_workspace/F6_qa_report.md) — NO contract drift (all 4 endpoints exact path/method/snake_case/status), phantom-endpoint check CLEAN (grep confirms only F3b paths), 3 terminal states distinct, surrogate id consistent, App.tsx merge clean (F4/F5 routes intact). Open E2E gate explicitly deferred to F9 (above). Minor follow-ups (LOW, non-blocking): act() warning in 1 loading test (hygiene); bulk-apply refresh resets to page 1 (page 2+ edge case, no test). Bundle/npm-vuln follow-ups still tracked for F8.

features.name: Theme extension: storefront safety block
features.description: Renders mapped warnings + responsible entity on the product page. High risk: E2E + human approval.
features.evidence: DONE — design approved + build TDD + security PASS + HUMAN APPROVAL (user 2026-06-29). E2E render tier DEFERRED to F9 (deployed env, runs F6+F7 together). FULL init.sh GREEN with DB tier: 'HARNESS XANH — verify chain passed.' DESIGN-FIRST: docs/specs/F7-storefront-contract.md approved; decisions Q1=Option B (metafields, server-side Liquid), Q2=surface metafield_sync_warning, Q3=needs_review→render nothing, Q4=single locale. ARCHITECTURE: storefront has no session token, so backend writes compliance to 3 app-owned product metafields (gpsr_status single_line_text, gpsr_entity_json + gpsr_warnings_json json) via Admin GraphQL metafieldsSet when apply-ruleset/override/webhook-needs_review runs; Liquid theme block reads them server-side (no JS, no public endpoint, Shopify-cached). BACKEND sub-task (TDD RED-first): service/shopify_metafield.go WriteComplianceMetafields via injected ShopifyMetafieldWriter (fake-tested, live deferred), ValidateShopDomain before egress (F3b-SEC-2 lesson), best-effort (DB commits first; failure→200 + metafield_sync_warning, non-fatal); wired into applyRuleset/setOverride (api.go) + webhook needs_review (webhook.go); repo GetShopifyProductID + GetShopCredentials (shop-scoped); storefrontEntityShape whitelists name/address/role only (no token/internal ids); 3 metafield defs in shopify.app.toml. Response shape: added optional metafield_sync_warning (non-breaking). Tests: TestWriteComplianceMetafields_* (ok/override/needs_review-clear/ValidatesShopDomain), TestApply_MetafieldFailure_DoesNotFailRequest, TestApply_MetafieldSuccess_NoWarning. No DB migration needed (shopify_product_id from 003). THEME EXTENSION: storefront/extensions/safety-block/ — shopify.extension.toml (type theme, handle gpsr-safety-block), blocks/safety-block.liquid (reads product.metafields.app.gpsr_*; renders ok/override→heading+entity+warnings, needs_review/absent→nothing; merchant settings heading/show_entity/show_warnings), assets/safety-block.css (no JS), locales/en.default.schema.json. XSS: all 5 metafield/setting outputs use | escape; grep CLEAN of | raw / html_safe / innerHTML / <script> / CSS expression(); merchant data only in text context (not attribute/style/script). 4-case render traced (ok/override/needs_review/absent). VERIFY: security-reviewer PASS no HIGH/CRITICAL (_workspace/F7_security_review.md, Opus) — XSS clean (| escape neutralizes <script>/onerror/javascript: in text context, fail-safe on malformed/absent), SSRF REPRODUCED-rejected (6 hostile domains → 0 egress dials), multi-tenant clean (shopID from context, shop-scoped lookups), no data leak (probe confirmed payload has no token/id/is_eu), no secret logged. 2 LOW non-blocking (F7-SEC-L1 warning echoes upstream Shopify msg to authenticated admin — can't carry token; F7-SEC-L2 product-id-0 guard — unreachable). Prior lessons F3-SEC-1 + F3b-SEC-2 present. DEFERRED to F9 (E2E on deployed dev-store): ok renders, needs_review hides, override renders, XSS-injection-escapes, shopify app build/deploy extension registration. README: storefront/README.md (install steps, metafield deps, XSS posture, verification).

features.name: Security hardening pass
features.description: settings.json deny rules + PreToolUse hook verified; storefront output escaping; injection review of merchant input. CARRY-OVER: address 5 frontend npm vulns (1 critical, dev-only — esbuild/vite/vitest, not in production bundle; fix = vite@8 breaking) deferred from F4 per user decision 2026-06-29.
features.evidence: DONE WITH CONDITION — application security posture PASS; ONE open item (F8-SEC-1) DEFERRED to F9/merge per user decision 2026-06-29 (must restore guardrails before merge/prod). FULL init.sh GREEN: 'HARNESS XANH — verify chain passed.' Whole-app pre-launch hardening pass (security-reviewer, Opus, DOER) consolidating prior per-feature reviews + finding cross-feature gaps + closing carry-overs. Report: _workspace/F8_security_hardening.md. VERDICT: app code acceptable for launch; every prior HIGH/MEDIUM re-verified FIXED IN CODE this pass (not just acknowledged): F3-SEC-1 (boot cfg.Validate() + empty-secret fail-closed in all 4 primitives), F3-SEC-2 (gin logger drops RawQuery), F3b-SEC-1 (setOverride product-ownership via GetWithCompliance), F3b-SEC-2 + F7 SSRF (ValidateShopDomain before egress on BOTH egress paths). HOLDS: SQL fully parameterized app-wide (grep: only ?,? placeholders, no value interpolation), storefront | escape everywhere + no | raw, no dangerouslySetInnerHTML on data in React, webhook raw-body HMAC fail-closed before unmarshal, no secret/token in any backend log, access_token json:"-". F8-SEC-1 (HIGH, harness/process, OPEN→deferred): .claude/settings.json permissions.deny array + PreToolUse hook block are currently COMMENTED OUT (user disabled during .env debugging); pretooluse-guard.sh script itself intact + correct (blocks rm-rf/fork-bomb/.env/.pem/id_rsa, fails closed if jq missing) — just not wired. .gitignore PASS (only .env.example tracked). EXACT restore lines documented in report; user chose to keep disabled for dev convenience and restore at F9/merge (added to F9 as a required deliverable). Carry-over DECISIONS: 5 npm vulns ALL devDependencies (vite/esbuild/vitest, not in prod bundle) → accept as dev-only, do NOT npm audit fix --force (vite@8 breaking), schedule separately; 658KB bundle → accept, code-split post-launch; F7-SEC-L1/L2 → defer accepted; F3-SEC-3 token-at-rest encryption → follow-up ticket. DEFERRED to F9: live E2E XSS test in real browser, live SSRF/OAuth/webhook against real Shopify, re-run init.sh after restoring guardrails. Review-only pass (no code change needed — all real findings already fixed by owners); init.sh left green.

features.name: Deploy config: shopify.app.toml + nginx + README
features.description: Fill root shopify.app.toml (app name, client_id, application_url, redirect_urls matching F3 auth callback, scopes read_products/write_products, webhooks for product create/update) and the storefront/ theme app extension config; push via Shopify CLI. nginx site conf in deploy/nginx/ for one domain (e.g. gpsr.quotesnap.local): location / -> frontend FE dist, location /api -> backend Go on 127.0.0.1:8000, reusing the existing SSL + CORS/OPTIONS-preflight pattern. deploy/README.md with build+deploy steps. Verify nginx config syntax (nginx -t). MUST-DO from F8 (F8-SEC-1, HIGH, deferred): RESTORE the security guardrails before merge/prod — un-comment permissions.deny array + the PreToolUse hook block in .claude/settings.json (exact lines in _workspace/F8_security_hardening.md), then re-run init.sh GREEN. Also run the deferred E2E (Playwright) for F6+F7 on the deployed env: products/compliance UI renders, storefront block ok-renders / needs_review-hides / override-renders / XSS-injection-escapes; live OAuth callback + webhook delivery + SSRF against real Shopify. F9 implements the app/uninstalled webhook handler using the proven F3b teardown delete order.
features.evidence: DONE — the last feature. FULL init.sh GREEN: 'HARNESS XANH — verify chain passed.' with DB tier REAL (handler 4.6s/migrate 3.7s/repository 4.4s after go clean -testcache — not skip-times). WHOLE-PROJECT: 184 tests green (backend 116 funcs across 5 pkgs 0 FAIL/0 unexpected SKIP + frontend 68 vitest). QA-integration PASS (_workspace/F9_qa_report.md). DELIVERABLES: (1) shopify.app.toml finalized — 3 [[webhooks.subscriptions]] products/create→/webhooks/products/create, products/update→/webhooks/products/update, app/uninstalled→/webhooks/app/uninstalled (URIs match RegisterWebhookRoutes exactly); scopes read_products,write_products; 3 metafield defs; API SECRET NOT in file (stays in .env). (2) app/uninstalled webhook handler (TDD RED→GREEN): handler/webhook.go handleAppUninstalled (raw-body HMAC fail-closed → resolve shop → teardown) + repository/shop.go TeardownShop transactional 3-step delete in F3b-proven order (compliance_record → classification_rule → shop; shop CASCADE handles entity/warning_template/product/joins; order required because classification_rule.entity_id is RESTRICT). Tests: TestWebhookUninstall_BadHMAC (401 no delete), _DeletesShopData (6 tables zeroed), _OnlyTargetShop (multi-tenant — shop B intact). (3) nginx deploy/nginx/gpsr.quotesnap.local.conf: /webhooks in location alternation, CSP not stripped, dev mode (proxy :5173 active) + prod mode (root frontend/dist + try_files SPA fallback, commented) both documented. (4) deploy/README.md: full build+deploy steps, migrate, Shopify CLI deploy, redirect_uri note, local-only-vs-public caveat, 6-step live E2E checklist. (5) GUARDRAILS RESTORED — closes F8-SEC-1 (HIGH): .claude/settings.json 15 deny entries + PreToolUse hook now ACTIVE (uncommented), pretooluse-guard.sh intact; confirmed live (a shell sourcing .env was BLOCKED during build+QA — guardrail working). init.sh still GREEN with hook active. LAUNCH GAPS (pre-prod hardening, not code defects, documented): F9-1 MEDIUM (nginx CORS reflects $http_origin with credentials for all locations — tighten to *.myshopify.com/admin.shopify.com allowlist for public domain; low exploitability in embedded JWT context); F9-2 LOW (nginx prod location / must be switched from dev Vite-proxy before real deploy — deploy checklist); F9-3 LOW (application_url placeholder must be set to real domain). NO HIGH/CRITICAL for launch; all prior HIGH/MEDIUM (F3-SEC-1/2, F3b-SEC-1/2, F7 SSRF) confirmed fixed in code; F8-SEC-1 closed. DEFERRED to live (need interactive Shopify + deployed env, USER to run): shopify app deploy, click Install OAuth, live product webhook delivery, live app/uninstalled, Playwright E2E for F6+F7 (ok-renders/needs_review-hides/override-renders/XSS-escapes), nginx prod-mode switch.
